title: Generic Notion database migration
userStory: As an operator, I want to point the migrator at any Notion database id and have each row become an episode so that the brain can ingest any structured Notion source without hand-coded shapes.
acceptanceCriteria: migrate_database(database_id) pages every row with the existing notion_client and emits one PlannedEpisode per row
Episode name uses the row's title property when present; falls back to '{database_label or database_id} row {created_time}'
Episode body flattens every property as 'Property Name: value' lines, in the order Notion returns them
reference_time + entity_hints are not on the migrator's surface — Graphiti's add_memory has neither; episode is server-timestamped and entity types live in the mounted config.yaml
Verify: --target <db-id> --kind database --dry-run prints planned episodes for at least one row, with no domain assumptions about property names
